title: 42nd Street
writer: Rian James, James Seymour, Bradford Ropes
actors: Warner Baxter, Bebe Daniels, George Brent
plot: When the leading lady of a Broadway musical breaks her ankle, she is replaced by a young unknown actress, who becomes the star of the show.
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 2 wins & 2 nominations total
